'''鈭歠-d-s-ng''' ('''kafadsengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:amber|amber]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-d-s-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:amber|amber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-d-s-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kafadsengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifadsengoko|thifadsengoko]] || [[word:jifadsengoko|jifadsengoko]] || [[word:shifadsengoko|shifadsengoko]] || [[word:kifadsengoko|kifadsengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafadsengoko|thafadsengoko]] || [[word:jafadsengoko|jafadsengoko]] || [[word:shafadsengoko|shafadsengoko]] || [[word:kafadsengoko|kafadsengoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
